signals.market_title: Will the official trailer for Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse be released Worldwide before Apr 1, 2026?

model_predictions.reasoning: The movie is scheduled for June 2027 release, giving over a year for trailer release before the April 2026 deadline. Recent headlines show producers are 'very confident' about meeting release dates and hint at showing footage soon, suggesting marketing campaign is progressing normally. The extremely low market price of $0.09 seems to underestimate the typical 12-18 month trailer lead time for major animated sequels.
Bull case: market at 0.09, sentiment is neutral (90% conf). Adjusting up by 17% for bull thesis.
Bear case: market at 0.09, sentiment is neutral (90% conf). Adjusting down by 7% for bear thesis.
